title: 404 Error when accessing n8n API for workflows
symptom: When attempting to retrieve all workflows via the n8n API, a 404 error is returned. This indicates that the requested resource could not be found.
applies_when: Using n8n API to get all workflows
root_cause: The 404 error typically occurs when the API endpoint is misconfigured or when there is a conflict in the server configuration, such as with a reverse proxy like nginx. This can prevent the request from reaching the n8n application correctly.
fix_steps: Check the nginx configuration for any conflicting settings
Ensure that the API endpoint is correctly routed to the n8n application
Restart the nginx service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Review and adjust the nginx configuration to resolve any conflicts.
